title: Inventory utility baseline and service boundaries
goal: Re-run a live package/container/Flatpak/Snap/port inventory and record the binding rules for all utility web surfaces before installation.

acceptance.assertion: The current apt, snap, flatpak, PATH, Docker, user-service and listening-port state is captured with date and command evidence.
Every planned web UI has an explicit bind/scope decision: localhost only, Tailnet only, or blocked.
No tool is installed in this task; it only records baseline and service-boundary evidence.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
validation: Infra PR #107 GitHub CI validate passed.
scripts/utilities/heim-utilities-smoke.sh reported Backrest, Beszel, Stirling PDF, Paperless, Atuin, Difftastic, rga and LocalSend OK.
Restic util-base-v1 snapshot and single-file restore probe passed.
Paperless imported synthetic PDF document id 1 and indexed content containing UTIL-BASE-V1.
Stirling PDF converted the probe PDF to text and merged two copies into a 2-page PDF.
Docling 2.111.0 converted the probe PDF to Markdown and JSON with UTIL-BASE-V1 content.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in infra PR #107 and live-smoked on heim-pc; see runtime evidence for exact boundaries and remaining manual steps.

verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t001-1: Inventory file and runtime evidence recorded live package/container/Flatpak/Snap/PATH/Docker/user-service/listener state.
verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t001-2: Compose publishes browser-facing services only on 127.0.0.1 for Backrest, Beszel, Stirling PDF and Paperless.
verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t001-3: The inventory task itself installed no tools; installations were recorded separately in infra PR #107 runtime evidence.
